phases.name: v0.2.0 - Chat Messaging & Multi-Tool
phases.description: Chat messaging support, module rename, and multi-tool configuration

items.title: Go module setup

items.title: Configuration management

items.description: Orchestrates voice calls using omnivoice interfaces with Twilio implementation

items.title: MCP voice tools
items.description: Four MCP tools: initiate_call, continue_call, speak_to_user, end_call

items.title: MCP server with ngrok
items.description: HTTP MCP server using mcpkit with built-in ngrok tunnel for webhooks

items.title: Twilio webhook handlers
items.description: HTTP handlers for Twilio voice, media stream, and status callbacks

items.title: README documentation
items.description: Project overview, architecture diagram, installation and usage instructions

items.title: Claude Code plugin manifest (v0.1)
items.description: Initial plugin.json using direct assistantkit adapter calls

items.title: Phone input skill (v0.1)
items.description: Initial SKILL.md using direct assistantkit adapter calls

items.title: Hooks configuration (v0.1)
items.description: Initial hooks using direct assistantkit adapter calls

items.title: Call slash command (v0.1)
items.description: Initial /call command using direct assistantkit adapter calls

items.title: Rename to agentcomms
items.description: Rename module from agentcall to agentcomms to reflect expanded scope

items.title: Chat manager
items.description: Chat message routing via omnichat for Discord, Telegram, WhatsApp

items.title: MCP chat tools
items.description: Three MCP tools: send_message, list_channels, get_messages

items.title: Configurable voice providers
items.description: TTS and STT can each be set to ElevenLabs, Deepgram, or OpenAI independently

items.title: Simplified omnivoice imports
items.description: Use omnivoice v0.6.0 with re-exported callsystem types

items.title: AssistantKit bundle package
items.description: New bundle package in assistantkit that unifies plugin, skills, commands, hooks into single type

items.title: Bundle Claude adapter
items.description: Claude Code adapter for bundle package - generates .claude-plugin/, skills/, commands/, .claude/

items.title: Bundle Kiro CLI adapter
items.description: AWS Kiro CLI adapter for bundle package - generates ~/.kiro/agents/, .kiro/settings/

items.title: Bundle Gemini CLI adapter
items.description: Gemini CLI adapter for bundle package - generates gemini-extension.json, agents/*.toml

items.title: Bundle Generate API
items.description: Single Generate(tool, dir) function to output bundle for any supported tool

items.title: Migrate agentcomms to bundle API
items.description: Refactor generate-plugin to use bundle.Generate() instead of direct adapter calls

items.title: Kiro CLI plugin generation
items.description: Generate Kiro CLI agent and MCP configuration for agentcomms

items.title: Gemini CLI plugin generation
items.description: Generate Gemini CLI extension and agent configuration for agentcomms

items.title: Multi-tool documentation
items.description: Documentation for using agentcomms with Claude Code, Kiro CLI, and Gemini CLI

items.title: Telnyx phone provider
items.description: Alternative phone provider via omnivoice-telnyx (50% cheaper than Twilio)

items.title: Call recording
items.description: Option to record calls for later review

items.title: Multi-user support
items.description: Support for calling different users based on context

items.title: SMS fallback
items.description: Fall back to SMS when call not answered

content.value: AgentComms is an MCP plugin that enables voice calls and chat messaging for AI coding assistants (Claude Code, AWS Kiro CLI, Gemini CLI), built with the plexusone stack (omnivoice, omnichat, mcpkit). Start a task, walk away. Your phone rings when the AI is done, stuck, or needs a decision—or get notified via Discord, Telegram, or WhatsApp.

items: **omnivoice** - Voice abstraction layer (TTS, STT, Transport, CallSystem interfaces)
**mcpkit** - MCP server runtime with built-in ngrok integration
**assistantkit** - Multi-tool plugin configuration management (Claude, Kiro, Gemini)

content.value: AgentComms supports multiple AI coding assistants through the assistantkit bundle API:

items: **Claude Code** - Plugin manifest, skills, commands, hooks
**AWS Kiro CLI** - Agent definitions, MCP server configuration

versionHistory.summary: Initial release with MCP server and Claude Code integration
Chat messaging, module rename, multi-tool support
